subject: Rename app to 🫩 Grumpy Campaign Kit
body:
Rename all user-facing references from "Social Ad Creator" to
"Grumpy Campaign Kit" with the 🫩 emoji. Updates UI headers,
PWA manifest, page title, tutorial, install instructions, and
all documentation. Migrates localStorage key from old name to
new name so existing saved designs are preserved.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Fzr4YXZsfJGyEnnJsLeC9g
